void-black.$description: Void Black — Page canvas, primary borders, icon strokes — the literal theater curtain everything sits on

smolder-earth.$description: Smolder Earth — Secondary surface tone — picks up a warm cast from the illustration overlay, used as a slightly lifted dark

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Dark borders and separators for elevated surfaces and inverted UI. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

bone-white.$description: Bone White — Hairline borders, dividers, input outlines, and card edges on light surfaces. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

ash.$description: Ash — Hairline borders on the dark button, subtle separators, muted off-white dividers

driftwood.$description: Driftwood — Muted surface for low-emphasis background panels and body containers

enreal.$description: Display and UI type. Weight 300 carries the title — a thin geometric sans that whispers against the dark canvas. The 0.042em tracking (roughly 0.67px at 16px) is wide for a sans, giving every word a cinematic, breathing quality. Body and labels step up to 400, reserved to 700 for the rare emphasis.

ciutadella-medium.$description: Secondary support face at weight 300 — used for small labels, links, and metadata. Tight line-height (1.0) and normal tracking make it a quiet, textural companion to the wider Enreal.

arial.$description: System fallback for button text and small body contexts where the custom faces are not loaded.

void-black.$description: Surface level 1: Underlying page canvas — the theater-dark base layer

smolder-earth.$description: Surface level 2: Warm dark surface that absorbs the illustration's color cast

charcoal.$description: Surface level 3: Secondary button fill and border — the only stepped dark
